overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a neon-lit covered night market. The player moves steadily from a narrow corridor past a bar entrance, through increasingly crowded market stalls, toward an exit with large digital billboards.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered corridor past parked motorcycles

entered.detail: green neon sign reading CHILL OUT above bar entrance
two parked motorcycles in front of the bar
illuminated vending machine with blue lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow covered corridor of a night market. A green neon CHILL OUT sign marks a bar entrance with two motorcycles parked outside. The player walks forward past a vending machine on the right, moving toward a doorway at the end of the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: market area with laundry service and food stalls

events.description: passing through doorway from narrow corridor into wider market space with stalls

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past seated NPCs and food vendors

notable_agents.action: NPC sitting on bench looking at handheld device

entered.detail: red neon sign for laundry service
blue painted food stall with illuminated display case
blue metal structural pillars supporting overhead walkway

segments.scene_description: Passing through a doorway, the space opens into a wider market area. A WASH & FOLD laundry sign appears on the right, while a blue food kiosk becomes the focal point ahead. Metal support pillars line the path, and an NPC sits on a bench to the right. The ground shows wet reflections from the neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market hall with multiple vendor stalls and metal pillars

events.description: dialogue text appears on screen indicating nearby NPC conversation
navigating through increasingly dense crowd of pedestrians

agents.ego_description: weaving through moderate crowd in the market hall

notable_agents.action: NPC in bright orange pants walking toward camera
NPC in white vest and dark shirt walking through crowd

entered.detail: elevated walkway with railings spanning above the market floor
various vendor stalls with goods and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The market opens into a large hall with metal support pillars lining the walkway. The crowd density increases with NPCs walking in various directions. An overhead walkway spans the ceiling, and market stalls line the sides. A dialogue notification appears, indicating ambient NPC conversation nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: market exit leading to main commercial street with digital billboards

events.description: approaching exit to open street with large digital billboard becoming visible ahead

agents.ego_description: moving through dense crowd toward the market exit

notable_agents.action: NPC in white jacket and cap walking toward camera
NPC with glowing purple visor and tank top walking past

entered.detail: massive screen displaying cherry blossom imagery and advertisements
small vendor stall with umbrella near the exit

segments.scene_description: Approaching the market exit, the crowd becomes dense with pedestrians moving in all directions. A massive digital billboard displaying cherry blossoms dominates the view ahead, marking the transition to the main commercial street. Various street vendors and shops line the exit path as the covered market opens to the outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a cramped, neon-lit corridor into a wider, bustling night market plaza. It begins by gliding through a narrow covered passage, passing a green neon CHILL OUT sign and parked motorcycles before moving past a vending machine toward a distant doorway. As the camera passes through this threshold, the confined space opens into a broader market area where the ground reveals wet reflections of the surrounding lights. The scene then expands to reveal a WASH & FOLD laundry sign and a blue food kiosk ahead, while the path is framed by metal support pillars and a seated NPC.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling covered night market that gradually opens into a bright, commercial street. It begins by entering a large hall where metal support pillars line the walkway and an overhead bridge spans the ceiling. As the camera moves forward, the crowd density increases with pedestrians weaving between various market stalls and ambient dialogue filling the air. The scene then shifts toward the market exit, where the throng of people becomes most dense among a row of street vendors and shops. Finally, the covered environment opens up to the outside as a massive digital billboard displaying cherry blossoms dominates the view, marking the transition to the main street.
